notFound.label: Page not found
notFound.title: Looks like something got lost here.
notFound.description: This page doesn't exist or has been moved. Our team has taken a closer look – best return to the homepage or give us a call directly.
notFound.image_alt: The practice team examining a missing webpage with a magnifying glass

forbidden.label: Access denied
forbidden.title: This page is off-limits.
forbidden.description: You don't have permission to access this page. Please return to the homepage or contact us directly.
forbidden.image_alt: The practice team standing in front of a locked webpage with a padlock icon

serverError.label: Server error
serverError.title: Something got a little out of hand here.
serverError.description: An unexpected error occurred on our server. Our team is already on it. Please try again shortly, return to the homepage or give us a call directly.
serverError.image_alt: The practice team trying to tame a robot that has gone haywire

badGateway.label: Bad gateway
badGateway.title: Something is pushing hard from the outside.
badGateway.description: An upstream connection isn't responding right now – our team is bracing against it with all their might. Please try again shortly, return to the homepage or give us a call directly.
badGateway.image_alt: The practice team bracing together against a gate as alien tentacles push through

hero.subtitle: Diabetology · Internal Medicine
hero.title:
Your health in
the best hands.
hero.description: Modern diabetology and internal medicine in Krauschwitz. Competent and compassionate care by {{doctor1}} and {{doctor2}}.

services.label: Services
services.title: Our Treatment Spectrum
services.general_desc: Family medicine for all ages – from acute care and preventive check-ups to long-term management of chronic conditions.
services.diabetology_desc: Diagnostics and therapy for type 1 & 2 diabetes, insulin pump therapy, CGM systems.
services.gestational_desc: Care and counselling for gestational diabetes for expectant mothers.
services.internal_desc: Comprehensive internal medicine diagnostics and treatment.
services.cardio_desc: Prevention and treatment of cardiovascular diseases.
services.metabolism_desc: Treatment of lipid metabolism disorders and metabolic syndrome.
services.checkup_desc: Check-ups, health prevention and individual counselling.

hours.label: Office Hours
hours.title: Our Opening Hours
hours.note: And by appointment. Please call to schedule.

team.label: Our Team
team.title: Expertise meets Compassion
team.pliquett_role: Specialist in Internal Medicine, Diabetologist DDG
team.pliquett_desc: Extensive experience in internal medicine and diabetology. Specialised in holistic care for patients with type 1, type 2 and gestational diabetes.
team.osorgina_desc: Dedicated internist with a focus on cardiovascular prevention and patient-centred care. Complements the practice team with expertise and empathy.

news.label: News
news.title: Practice Updates
news.item1_text: Our practice will be closed from 2 to 6 April. In urgent cases, please contact the medical on-call service at 116 117.
news.item2_text: Use spring for your annual diabetes check-up. We offer comprehensive HbA1c tests, foot examinations, and individual counselling.
news.item3_text: We now offer the latest continuous glucose monitoring system. Ask us about it at your next appointment.

gallery.label: Our Practice
gallery.title: A Look Inside Our Premises
gallery.team: Our team is here for you

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Good to Know
faq.first_visit_q: What should I bring to my first visit?
faq.first_visit_a: Please bring your health insurance card, a referral (if available), your current medication list, and any relevant medical records.
faq.parking_a: Yes, free parking is available directly in front of the practice. Accessible parking spaces are also provided.
faq.insurance_a: We treat patients with all statutory and private health insurances. Please bring your insurance card to every visit.
faq.prescription_a: Prescriptions can be ordered by phone, email, or via our contact form. Please allow 2 working days. The prescription will be ready for pick-up.
faq.appointment_q: How do I schedule an appointment?
faq.appointment_a: Appointments can be made by phone during office hours or via our contact form. In emergencies, please come directly to the practice.
faq.documents_q: What documents do I need as a diabetic?
faq.documents_a: Please bring your blood sugar diary, diabetes passport, current medication list, and your insulin pump ID if applicable.

directions.label: Directions
directions.title: How to find us
directions.by_car_desc:
From Weißwasser: approx. 15 min. via the B156.
From Görlitz: approx. 40 min. via the B115. Parking available directly at the practice.
directions.public_transport_desc: Bus connections from Weißwasser and Bad Muskau. Stop 'Krauschwitz Mitte', 3 min. walk.
directions.map_consent: To protect your data, the map will only be loaded after your consent (GDPR).

imprint.title: Legal Notice
imprint.profession_desc:
Physician (awarded in the Federal Republic of Germany)
Responsible medical chamber: Saxon State Medical Association
Responsible Association of Statutory Health Insurance Physicians: KV Saxony
imprint.regulations_desc:
Professional code of the Saxon State Medical Association
Health Professions Act of the Free State of Saxony
imprint.disclaimer_desc: The contents of our pages have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness and timeliness of the contents.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.s1_text: The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data that can be used to personally identify you.
privacy_page.s3_text: If you send us enquiries via the contact form, your details from the enquiry form, including the contact details you provide, will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the enquiry. We will not share this data without your consent. This data is processed on the basis of Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR.
privacy_page.s3b_text: As a medical practice, we may process health data, which is classified as a special category of personal data under Art. 9 para. 1 GDPR. Processing is carried out on the basis of Art. 9 para. 2 lit. h GDPR for purposes of health care and medical treatment. Please do not submit health data via the contact form – please discuss medical matters in person or by phone.
privacy_page.s4_text: This site uses SSL or TLS encryption for security reasons. An encrypted connection is indicated by the browser address bar changing from 'http://' to 'https://' and by the lock icon in your browser bar.
privacy_page.s5_text: This website is hosted externally. The personal data collected on this website is stored on the servers of the host.
privacy_page.s6_text: We use the mapping service of OpenStreetMap (OSM). When the map function is called, data is transmitted to the OpenStreetMap servers. The map is only loaded after explicit consent (two-click solution).
privacy_page.s7_text: This website only uses technically necessary cookies required for the operation of the site. No tracking or analytics cookies are used. You can accept or decline cookies via a banner on your first visit.
privacy_page.s8_text: Data submitted via the contact form will remain with us until you request deletion, revoke your consent to storage, or the purpose for data storage no longer applies. Mandatory legal provisions – in particular retention periods under medical professional law (10 years) – remain unaffected.
privacy_page.s9_text: You have the right to receive information free of charge at any time about the origin, recipient and purpose of your stored personal data. You also have the right to request the correction, blocking or deletion of this data.
privacy_page.s10_text: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent data protection supervisory authority. The responsible authority is the Saxon Data Protection Commissioner (Devrientstraße 5, 01067 Dresden, saechsdsb@slt.sachsen.de).

cookie.text: This website only uses technically necessary cookies to ensure basic functionality. No tracking or analytics cookies are used.
